attributes.text: Reviewers consistently praise the smooth onboarding and fast launch performance. Several mention the new dark mode positively. A recurring complaint is that sync between devices broke for some users after the 2.4 update; a few users requested a home-screen widget.
Nutzer loben die schnelle Startzeit und den neuen Dunkelmodus. Einige Rezensenten kritisieren Sync-Probleme nach dem letzten Update.
